title: Kick Boxing Sport
description: Kickboxing is a dynamic combat sport combining punches and kicks, improving strength, discipline, and fitness, inspired by famous fighters and practiced worldwide for competition and self-defense.

title: Quiz Game
description: Quiz Game is an interactive web game that tests knowledge through fun questions, improves thinking skills, and challenges players across different topics with simple, engaging gameplay.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
description: Tic-Tac-Toe is a simple strategy game where two players take turns placing symbols, aiming to align three marks in a row using logic, focus, and quick decision-making.

title: Snake Game
description: Snake is a classic arcade game where players control a growing snake, collect food, and avoid collisions, testing reflexes, focus, and strategic movement to achieve the highest score.

title: Restaurant Chafik
description: A modern restaurant website showcasing delicious menu items, seamless online ordering, responsive design, and an engaging user experience.

title: Super Market
description: A supermarket app that helps users browse products, compare prices, manage shopping lists, and order essentials easily, offering a fast, secure, and convenient shopping experience anytime, anywhere.
